title: ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT - 211info
text: IMMIGRANT AND REFUGEE COMMUNITY ORGANIZATION ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides training and accreditation services to provide home-based child care, microenterprise development services, financial literacy training, and individual development accounts (IDAs). 10301 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Call for information Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (971) 271-6470 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Program phone (971) 271-6470 Tina Do [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement. IRCO has language resources available to ensure that clients can speak with someone in their own language for all programs. AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Business Development Child Care Provider Training Financial Literacy Training Individual Development Accounts Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH ACADEMIC SUPPORT AND PARENT ENGAGEMENT EMPLOYMENT - EMPLOYMENT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN'S PROGRAMS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - INTERNATIONAL LANGUAGE BANK INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SERVICES AGAINST EXPLOITATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SLAVIC AND EASTERN EUROPEAN CENTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH MENTORING INFORMATION SERVICES - SENIOR SERVICES LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - GANG PREVENTION AND INTERVENTION LEGAL SERVICES - IMMIGRATION AND COUNSELING MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - FAMILY PROGRAMS PUBLIC SAFETY - PRESCHOOL FOR ALL EARLY CHILDHOOD PROGRAM TAX ORGANIZATIONS AND SERVICES - TAX SUPPORT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
